/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/automation_backend.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/automation_backend.dir/src/worker/ShellTask.cpp.o -o automation_backend  vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libcpr.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libcurl-d.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/libz.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libssl.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libcrypto.a -ldl
